item.title: charles_watts: Charles Watts @charles_watts · 29s Job done. Not great from Arsenal, but far better than Saturday (that wasn’t hard). Gr
item.description:
Charles Watts @charles_watts · 29s Job done. Not great from Arsenal, but far better than Saturday (that wasn’t hard). Great to see Zubimendi play well, best player on the pitch. Eze was bright before understandably tiring. Defensively largely solid, Hincapie impressive on his return to the XI.
That staring front Mostrar más 2 15 146

item.title: MiguelDelaney: Miguel Delaney @MiguelDelaney · 2min Only the fifth time since the Champions League’s 1999 expansion that the semi-final
item.description:
Miguel Delaney @MiguelDelaney · 2min Only the fifth time since the Champions League’s 1999 expansion that the semi-finals feature clubs from four different countries
And first time it’s happened twice in a row
2004: 2010: 2018: 2025: 2026: 2 12 524

item.title: ed_aarons: Ed Aarons @ed_aarons · 6min Arteta on Rice coming off his sickbed to play tonight: “Declan yesterday, he was shattered.
item.description: Ed Aarons @ed_aarons · 6min Arteta on Rice coming off his sickbed to play tonight: “Declan yesterday, he was shattered. He had no chance to play today, he wasn't feeling good at all today, he played 94 minutes at the level that he's done. Piero [Hincapie] the same. I really value that from the team.” 1 8 667

item.title:
footballontnt: Football on TNT Sports @footballontnt · 9min “I tried it 5 or 6 times before, I was getting closer each time”
Michael O
